shortDescription: IND · MVV entry visa · Residence permit · Recognised sponsor institution

policyAlert.summary: Confirm IND fees and financial requirements on ind.nl before quoting.

alert.title: MVV + residence permit two-step
alert.body: Institution applies for MVV/residence permit via IND. Student collects MVV sticker then travels and collects residence card.

kpis.label: Government fee
kpis.sub: + proof of funds required living funds

about.label: Description
about.value: National visa (Type D) for study at a recognised Dutch university or preparatory course. After entry, convert to residence permit at local Ausländerbehörde.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: University admission (Zulassung) or conditional admission · Proof of funds or scholarship · admission documentation (India) · Health insurance · Motivation letter

about.label: Proof of funds
about.value: required living funds for 2026 (12 × €992/month) typically required unless scholarship or sponsor alternative applies.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: Dutch Embassy/Consulate in India · Federal Foreign Office · Local Ausländerbehörde after arrival

about.label: After approval
about.value: Enter Dutchy; register address; apply for residence permit at Ausländerbehörde within visa validity.

eligibility.criterion: Proof of funds or financial proof
eligibility.note: required living funds for 2026 or equivalent

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, address embassy feedback before rebooking—proof of funds and APS cannot be rushed last minute.

redFlags.title: APS not completed
redFlags.description: Visa appointment booked without admission documentation.
redFlags.fix: Complete APS before embassy slot; track processing on APS website

redFlags.title: Insufficient proof of funds
redFlags.description: Amount below required monthly sum or not from recognised provider.
redFlags.fix: Open proof of funds at approved bank for full required amount

redFlags.title: Admission not from recognised institution
redFlags.description: Private unrecognised college or expired Zulassung.

redFlags.title: Weak motivation letter
redFlags.description: Generic letter not explaining study plan and Dutchy choice.
redFlags.fix: Course-specific motivation linking prior study to Dutch program

redFlags.title: Language proof missing
redFlags.description: Program requires Dutch/English certificate not provided.

faqs.q: Can we guarantee student visa approval?
faqs.a: No. Embassy decides based on admission, funds, and credibility. Never promise approval.

faqs.q: What is APS?
faqs.a: Academic Evaluation Centre verification for Indian academic documents—mandatory for most Indian student visa applicants.

faqs.q: Proof of funds amount for 2026?
faqs.a: Typically required living funds (12 months × €992). Verify current amount before opening account.

faqs.q: Can spouse accompany?
faqs.a: Dependants may apply separately; prove additional funds and accommodation. Assess case-by-case.

faqs.q: English-taught programs need Dutch?
faqs.a: Depends on program—follow admission and embassy requirements.

faqs.q: How long to convert to residence permit?
faqs.a: Apply at Ausländerbehörde soon after arrival and registration.

faqs.q: Can I work on student visa?
faqs.a: Limited working hours permitted—verify current rules for students in Dutchy.

faqs.q: What after graduation?
faqs.a: Discuss 18-month job-seeker residence permit or Opportunity Card separately.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: National visa (Type D) for study at a recognised Dutch university or preparatory course. After entry, convert to residence permit at local Ausländerbehörde.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: University admission (Zulassung) or conditional admission · Proof of funds or scholarship · admission documentation (India) · Health insurance · Motivation letter

faqs.q: What is Proof of funds for this service?
faqs.a: required living funds for 2026 (12 × €992/month) typically required unless scholarship or sponsor alternative applies.

faqs.q: Important note on Proof of funds?
faqs.a: required living funds for 2026 (12 × €992/month) typically required unless scholarship or sponsor alternative applies.

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: Dutch Embassy/Consulate in India · Federal Foreign Office · Local Ausländerbehörde after arrival

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Enter Dutchy; register address; apply for residence permit at Ausländerbehörde within visa validity.

faqs.q: Is Admission from recognised Dutch institution required?
faqs.a: Admission from recognised Dutch institution is typically required.

faqs.q: Is admission documentation (India) required?
faqs.a: Apply early—processing takes weeks

faqs.q: Is Proof of funds or financial proof required?
faqs.a: required living funds for 2026 or equivalent

faqs.q: Is Health insurance (travel + statutory) required?
faqs.a: Assess whether Health insurance (travel + statutory) is satisfied for this case.

faqs.q: Is Motivation letter and CV required?
faqs.a: Motivation letter and CV is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Language proficiency (as required) required?
faqs.a: Dutch or English per program

faqs.q: Is Valid passport required?
faqs.a: Valid passport is typically required.

faqs.q: What is the Processing time?
faqs.a: 6–12w — After complete file + APS

faqs.q: What is the Government fee?
faqs.a: €75 — + proof of funds required living funds

faqs.q: What is the Our approval rate?
faqs.a: 88% — ~74% benchmark

faqs.q: What is the Required docs?
faqs.a: 15 — + APS & proof of funds

faqs.q: What is the Consultancy fee?
faqs.a: See fee tab — + govt & third-party

faqs.q: What if the client has APS not completed?
faqs.a: Complete APS before embassy slot; track processing on APS website

faqs.q: Why is APS not completed a problem?
faqs.a: Visa appointment booked without admission documentation.

faqs.q: What if the client has Insufficient proof of funds?
faqs.a: Open proof of funds at approved bank for full required amount

faqs.q: Why is Insufficient proof of funds a problem?
faqs.a: Amount below required monthly sum or not from recognised provider.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
Proof of funds funds belong to client—never commingle with firm accounts
proTips: Start APS 3–4 months before intended intake
Open proof of funds only after admission confirmed
Book embassy slot when file 90% ready
Motivation letter must match admission course
Verify health insurance accepted by embassy
postApproval: Guide on Ausländerbehörde appointment after arrival
Remind proof of funds monthly withdrawal rules

timeline.title: APS processing, proof of funds, documents

changelog.summary: Initial Dutchy student visa counselor content with 2026 proof of funds amount.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: APS backlog is real—do not promise winter intake without APS timeline confirmation.

quiz.question: Indian students generally need:
options: Only passport
admission documentation + admission + proof of funds
Job offer
EU citizenship
quiz.explanation: APS mandatory for India.

quiz.question: Proof of funds 2026 amount approx:
options: required living funds
quiz.explanation: 12 × €992 monthly requirement.

quiz.question: National visa fee approx:
options: Free
quiz.explanation: Embassy national visa fee.

quiz.question: After arrival student must:
options: Ignore registration
Register address and apply residence permit
Work full-time immediately
Leave in 1 week
quiz.explanation: Anmeldung and Ausländerbehörde required.

quiz.question: Counselors must never:
options: Track APS
Guarantee visa approval
Verify admission
Check proof of funds
quiz.explanation: No guarantees.
